objective: Generate one independently sealed 24-case RuleWeave-5 panel after freezing the verified-holdout architecture, avoiding any ambiguity from previously opened multi-panel answer files.

design.zero_overlap_guard: Reject exact visible-prefix, canonical-program, and next-five overlap against Experiments 02, 03, 04, and prior Experiment 05 benchmarks.

answer_isolation: The generator writes answers to a new dedicated file. Neither the generation command nor any pre-scoring audit may print or parse answer contents. Only its SHA-256 is recorded until every registered subject job is terminal.
